calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori cheshire.
Victor Lipovetsky, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Rosa Boverman and David Breyterman.
Plaintiff: Rosa Boverman, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: Cham Nguyen ind and guardian at litem, and Michael Nguyen, a minor.
Matter is taken under submission, the Court to review the mediation brief and medical records, and to award damages within a week.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

Oct. 28, 2005
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $65,000.00
Costs $873.74, for a total of $65,873.74
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Steve MacLean, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Rosa Boverman
Steven Pabros, Esq. on behalf of defendant Nancy Zeidler

The parties indicated they have settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendant Nancy Zeidler to pay plaintiff Rosa Boverman the sum of $46,000.00. Each side to bear their own costs.
